---
title: "Personas Desaparecidas en México"
subtitle: "Tarea 02 — Almacenes y Minería de Datos"
date: today
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: sandstone
    scrolling: true
jupyter: tarea02
execute:
  warning: false
  echo: false
---
```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

df = pd.read_csv("data/tot_reg_desap.csv")
```

# Descripción del Dataset
